title: achnatherum curvifolium
intro: Achnatherum curvifolium, also known as bentgrass or curved-leaved grama grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Achnatherum curvifolium include treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Achnatherum curvifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in natural remedies to promote healing and soothe various ailments.
